response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX embedded environments, no evidence of Linux kernel modification or embedded networking expertise, and no Japanese language proficiency — all non-negotiable for this role. His background is heavily focused on web, mobile, and full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript systems, with no visible exposure to MACsec, 802.1X, switch firmware, or embedded security protocols.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across diverse platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems and tooling
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX firmware contexts
Zero evidence of Linux kernel analysis or security feature development
Lacks native-level Japanese language proficiency, a mandatory requirement
